title: CBP Node
description: Canonical schema for a Context Binding Protocol node. Covers all four node types: entity, state, prior, frame.

id.description: BLAKE3-derived display identifier. First 8 hex characters of the BLAKE3 hash of the node's content fields (type, val, lineage, tags). Extended one character at a time on collision, up to the full 64-character hex representation of the 32-byte hash.

type.description: Node type per Section II of the CBP architecture reference.

val.description: Node payload. Any valid JSON value. Content semantics vary by node type.

w.description: Relevance weight. 0.0 = irrelevant (candidate for GC), 1.0 = maximally relevant. Inheritable (invariant #2): if omitted, the value is inherited from the nearest ancestor that declares it (prototypal mode), falling back to the spec default 1.0. Not part of the content hash.

decay.description: Decay policy. 'epoch' = weight decays on each GC epoch advance. 'event' = weight resets on a named event trigger. 'none' = no automatic decay (explicitly auditable). Inheritable (invariant #2): if omitted, inherited from the lineage chain, falling back to the spec default 'epoch'. Not part of the content hash.

ttl.description: Hard expiry in seconds from creation. Null means no hard expiry; decay policy still applies. Inheritable (invariant #2): if omitted, inherited from the lineage chain, falling back to the spec default null. Not part of the content hash.

lineage.description: Parent node id in the inheritance chain. Null only for frame root nodes. Resolution walks upward through lineage until it reaches a frame node.

tags.description: Categorization tags. Used for CBQ filtering (tag:<value>) and frame ACLs (acl:<token-id>).

v.description: Schema version / optimistic concurrency counter. Monotonically increasing. Used for CAS on upsert (G7).

prev.description: Id of the prior version of the same logical node. Implements append-mostly history per invariant #6. Distinct from the 'supersedes' edge type (G9). Null on first version.

nodeId.description: BLAKE3-derived node identifier. 8-64 lowercase hex characters.
